data.content: 1. [src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts:273] The test named for max-iterations rollback does not drive the max-iterations branch. Its own setup/commentary states it intentionally exercises the initial child non-zero exit path, so it only re-tests the branch already covered at src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1218-1221 and leaves the actual max-iterations rollback path at src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1224-1233 unverified. Required behavior from the knot description is still missing.
